shortDescription: "A multi-dimensional array is one thing"

When we allocate a multi-dimensional array e.g., with `new int[x][y][z]`,
one single array object is created, which directly provides space for all the elements.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A multi-dimensional array is one thing
frontmatter.shortCorrection: A multi-dimensional is a structure of nested arrays
